title: Subnet Plan v1
description: Schema for decisions.subnet_plan emitted by 03-Architect Phase 6b (VNet planning gate). Authoring rules in .github/skills/azure-defaults/references/vnet-planning.md.

name.description: Subnet name. Reserved names (AzureBastionSubnet, AzureFirewallSubnet, GatewaySubnet, RouteServerSubnet) must match exactly and may only appear when the respective resource is in scope.

address_prefix.description: IPv4 CIDR for the subnet. Must be non-overlapping and fully inside vnet_address_space.

purpose.description: Workload purpose. Maps to a row in the subnet sizing matrix (vnet-planning.md). Use 'custom' only when no matrix row fits.

delegation.description: Subnet delegation. Use the canonical Microsoft.* resource type string; 'none' when not delegated.

nsg.description: 'auto' (default — NSG created per CAF naming), '<name>' (reuse an existing NSG by name), or 'none' (explicit opt-out; governance may forbid this).

service_endpoints.description: Service endpoint resource types (e.g. Microsoft.Storage, Microsoft.KeyVault). Default empty.

private_endpoint_network_policies.description: Schema default is 'Enabled'. Set explicitly to 'Disabled' for private-endpoint subnets (Azure requirement for PE traffic).

ipv6_prefix.description: Optional IPv6 CIDR. Reserved for v2 schema; behaviour deferred until governance requires it.
